params.text:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
PaperClaw -- Pinokio Web App
A Gradio-based interface for generating research papers via p2pclaw.com.
"""

import json
import uuid
import requests
import gradio as gr

PAPERCLAW_API = 'https://www.p2pclaw.com/api'

def generate_paper(topic, agent_name):
    if not topic.strip():
        return 'Please enter a topic.', ''
    agent_id = f'pinokio-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]}'
    name = agent_name.strip() or 'PaperClaw-Pinokio'
    log = []
    
    # Register
    log.append('Registering on p2pclaw.com/silicon...')
    try:
        r = requests.post(f'{PAPERCLAW_API}/quick-join', json={'agentId': agent_id, 'name': name, 'type': 'research-agent'}, timeout=30)
        log.append(f'Registered: {agent_id}')
    except Exception as e:
        log.append(f'Error: {e}')
        return '\n'.join(log), ''
    
    # Research
    log.append(f'Searching arXiv for: {topic}')
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'{PAPERCLAW_API}/lab/search-arxiv', params={'q': topic}, timeout=30)
        papers = r.json().get('results', [])
        log.append(f'Found {len(papers)} papers')
    except Exception as e:
        papers = []
        log.append(f'Search error: {e}')
    
    # Tribunal
    log.append('Presenting to tribunal...')
    try:
        r = requests.post(f'{PAPERCLAW_API}/tribunal/present', json={'agentId': agent_id, 'topic': topic, 'evidence': {'papers': len(papers)}}, timeout=30)
        clearance = r.json().get('clearance', '')
        log.append('Tribunal clearance obtained')
    except Exception as e:
        clearance = ''
        log.append(f'Tribunal error: {e}')
    
    # Build paper
    citations = '\n'.join(f'[{i+1}] {p.get("title", "Untitled")}' for i, p in enumerate(papers[:8]))
    paper = f'# {topic}\n\n## Abstract\nA formal investigation of {topic}.\n\n## Introduction\n...\n\n## Related Work\n{citations or "None"}\n\n## Methodology\n...\n\n## Experiments\n...\n\n## Results\n...\n\n## Conclusion\n...\n\n## References\n{citations}'
    
    # Publish
    log.append('Publishing...')
    try:
        r = requests.post(f'{PAPERCLAW_API}/publish-paper', json={'title': topic, 'content': paper, 'author': name, 'agentId': agent_id, 'tribunal_clearance': str(clearance)}, timeout=30)
        score = r.json().get('score', 'pending')
        log.append(f'Published! Score: {score}')
    except Exception as e:
        log.append(f'Publish error: {e}')
    
    return '\n'.join(log), paper

with gr.Blocks(title='PaperClaw') as app:
    gr.Markdown('# PaperClaw Research Pipeline')
    gr.Markdown('Generate formal research papers via [p2pclaw.com](https://p2pclaw.com)')
    with gr.Row():
        topic = gr.Textbox(label='Topic', placeholder='e.g., Graph neural networks', scale=3)
        name = gr.Textbox(label='Agent Name', placeholder='PaperClaw', scale=1)
    btn = gr.Button('Generate Paper', variant='primary')
    with gr.Row():
        status = gr.Textbox(label='Status', lines=10)
        output = gr.Markdown(label='Paper')
    btn.click(generate_paper, [topic, name], [status, output])

app.launch(server_name='0.0.0.0', server_port=7860)
